header.servicer: Chase Home Finance (transferring to Rocket Mortgage effective May 15, 2026)

sections.heading: Liens and Encumbrances
sections.body: Summary of all liens and encumbrances identified from title search and supporting documentation. Each block provides exact recorded information and statuses as required.

blocks.title: First Mortgage — JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A.

citations.claim: First mortgage in the amount of $612,500.00 dated June 3, 2022 and recorded June 10, 2022 as Instrument No. 2022-00892345 with JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A.

spans.raw_text:

blocks.title: Federal Tax Lien — Internal Revenue Service
blocks.notes: IRS may need to be named in foreclosure complaint due to federal statutory requirements.
action_items: Assess federal redemption period and notice obligations under 28 U.S.C. § 2410.

citations.claim: Notice of Federal Tax Lien filed by the IRS against Linda M. Thompson in the amount of $47,829.03 for tax years 2022-2023, recorded November 4, 2025 as Instrument No. 2025-0114872.

spans.raw_text:
3. Notice of Federa1 Tax Lien fi1ed by the INTERNAL REVENUE
   SERVICE against Linda M. Th0mpson in the amount of $47,829.03
   for tax years 2022-2023, recorded November 4, 2O25 as
   Instrument No. 2025-0114872.

citations.claim: Servicer email confirms IRS lien and flags need for review of statutory requirements.

spans.raw_text:
- We received a lien-title update showing a federal tax lien filed against the
  borrower by the IRS for $47,829.03. Please review whether the IRS needs to be
  named as a party defendant in the foreclosure complaint  our understanding
  is the federal statutory redemption period creates specific notice requirements
  under 28 U.S.C. a7 2410. Please advise.

blocks.title: Mechanic's Lien — Hernandez & Sons Construction
blocks.notes: Mechanic's lien for unpaid remodeling work (March–September 2025) must be resolved prior to sale.
action_items: Address mechanic's lien prior to closing any transaction.

citations.claim: Mechanic's Lien by Hernandez & Sons Construction for $18,650.00, recorded January 7, 2026 as Instrument No. 2026-0004421. Work performed March–September 2025.

spans.raw_text:
4. Mechanic's Lien fi1ed by HERNANDEZ & SONS CONSTRUCT1ON in the
   amount of $18,650.00 for unpaid remode1ing work, recorded
   January 7, 2O26 as Instrument No. 2026-0004421. Work performed
   between March and September 2O25 per attached c1aim.

citations.claim: Servicer flagged mechanic's lien as needing resolution before sale.

spans.raw_text:
- Also flagged on title: a mechanic's lien for $18,650.00 from Hernandez & Sons
  Construction for a bathroom/kitchen remodel. Needs to be addressed before
  any sale.
